caption.full:
Katy Perry's concert film is expanding to 70 countries worldwide.

The Lifetimes Tour – Live From Paris documentary was filmed over two sold-out nights in Paris in November 2025. The film premiered at the Tribeca Festival in June 2026 and is now getting a limited global cinema run.

Reliving Paris with Katy—who are you bringing this night to?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #KatyPerry #TheLifetimesTour #ConcertFilm
caption.firstComment: This cinematic rollout proves the Paris nights were legendary, not just another tour film.

What do you think of this global release?

youtube.title: Katy Perry Film: 70 Countries, 60 Cameras
youtube.description:
Katy Perry's concert film "The Lifetimes Tour – Live From Paris" is getting a limited global cinema run across 70 countries. The documentary was shot across two sold-out nights in Paris in November 2025, with director Paul Dugdale managing a 60-camera setup. Producer Daniel E. Catullo III called it 'Katy's love letter to her fans.'

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

Watch more: https://thescreenreport.com/celebrity/katy-perry-s-lifetimes-tour-concert-film-sets-worldwide-theatrical-release/
